description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender cylindrical pole with a flared, ornate base that provides stability and a touch of classic elegance. The upper section is topped with a single lantern-style lamp head, which has a polygonal, slightly tapered housing and a pointed finial at the very top. The lamp head is partially frosted or opaque, suggesting a diffused light source within. The post itself is smooth and dark, likely made of metal, and includes a subtle decorative collar just below the lamp head. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional Victorian or Edwardian street lighting, suitable for urban sidewalks, parks, or historic districts. No visible signage, banners, or additional attachments are present, and the structure appears robust and fixed in place.
description: A tall, classic lamppost with a single lantern-style lamp head, ornate base, and smooth dark metal finish. The design is elegant and traditional, suitable for urban or park settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, ornate base, and the polygonal lamp head with a pointed finial.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the frosted or opaque lamp head and the slender, smooth pole.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, emphasizing the symmetry and classic design of the lamp head and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the lamp head's frosted section and the decorative collar below it.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Polygonal lantern-style head with a pointed finial and frosted panels, reminiscent of Victorian street lamps.
